case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, VS. LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1739 O'FARREL ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED APR-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC.

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTFS

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC. SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED APR-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON & SAVAGE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE AND COMPLETE BUSINESS SERVICE AND DBA JACKSON HEWITT TAX SERVICE INC.
